user.title: HA GitOps
user.description: Link this Home Assistant configuration directory (/config) to a Git remote using SSH. A deploy key with access to the repository must already exist at the SSH path (or use the default under .ha_gitops/).

data.ssh_key_path: Private SSH key: leave empty for .ha_gitops/id_ed25519 under the config dir, or enter an absolute path, or a path relative to the config directory (e.g. .ha_gitops/id_ed25519)

abort.already_configured: HA GitOps is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

error.git_error: Could not initialize the Git repository. Check the URL, branch, SSH key path, and Home Assistant logs.

init.title: HA GitOps
init.description: Change the Git remote, branch, commit author, SSH key path, or how often the sync status sensor is polled. Settings are checked with GitManager.initialize() before saving; the integration reloads afterward.

data.ssh_key_path: Private SSH key: leave empty for .ha_gitops/id_ed25519 under the config dir, or enter an absolute path, or a path relative to the config directory (e.g. .ha_gitops/id_ed25519)

error.git_error: Could not initialize the Git repository. Check the URL, branch, SSH key path, and Home Assistant logs.

commit.name: Commit
commit.description: Stage allowed YAML and .gitignore, then create a local commit without pushing.

message.name: Commit message
message.description: Optional full git commit message. Leave empty to use the adaptive HA GitOps template from changed files.
